patch.value: Add --milestones markers to gantt chart and exports

New --milestones <list> flag on the gantt command and gantt exporter accepting comma-separated name=YYYY-MM-DD entries. ASCII: labeled vertical markers (parity with TODAY marker) in the correct week column, comma-joined when sharing a week, out-of-window ignored with a stderr note. Mermaid: native :milestone markers in a Milestones section on the exact date. CSV: appended milestone rows so dates round-trip. Invalid name=date entries raise a clean CommandError (usage exit 2), not a crash. Unit tests + README + changelog regen; release:check green.

value.author: codex
value.text:
DESIGN + RESULTS

Week-column mapping (reused from TODAY marker): added milestoneWeek(date, windowStart, weeks) that mirrors the existing TODAY math exactly — floor((date - windowStart)/(7*DAY_MS)), returning -1 when date < windowStart or >= windowStart+weeks (window end exclusive). This guarantees milestone markers and item bars never disagree about which column a date falls in. The ASCII renderer drops a dedicated marker row right after the TODAY row: per-week buckets collect milestone names, rendered as '#NAME' (downward caret + name); multiple milestones in the same week are comma-joined (e.g. caret+'v1.0,beta'). Cell content may overflow the 6-char WEEK_COL by design (the label is the payload). Legend gains a 'milestone date' entry only when at least one is in-window.

Mermaid: emit a dedicated 'section Milestones' at the end (after the today comment) with native zero-duration markers ':milestone, mN, ISODATE, 0d' per in-window milestone, so Mermaid renders them as diamonds on the exact date. Out-of-window milestones are excluded from Mermaid (windowed view).

CSV: renderCsv gained an optional second arg milestones (default [] — backward compatible with existing single-arg call sites/tests). Milestone rows are appended after item rows: id='milestone:<name>', title=name, start=end=date, status='milestone', all other columns blank. CSV intentionally includes out-of-window milestones too, since CSV is a data round-trip not a windowed view.

Validation: parseMilestones splits on commas, tolerates blank/trailing entries, requires '=' (else usage error), non-empty name (else usage error), and strict /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/ + parseDate (rejects loose/full-ISO and impossible dates like 2026-13-40). All failures throw CommandError with exitCode=2 (EXIT_CODE.USAGE) — the package's clean non-zero-exit pattern, no crash/double-invocation. Wired into resolveGanttOptions (opts.milestones), the gantt command + exporter (both emit a one-line stderr NOTE listing dropped out-of-window milestones via offWindowMilestones()), and the command JSON result (milestones[]: {name,date,week,inWindow}). Registered --milestones flag + example on the command.

Architecture: pure helpers, import type only, no SDK runtime imports; reads unchanged (existing spawnSync pm list-all). typecheck clean.

TESTS: added test/milestones.test.ts (13 new tests): parseMilestones parse/blank+stray-comma/malformed-rejection(exitCode 2); milestoneWeek correct column + -1 before/after; offWindowMilestones lists only dropped; renderGantt marker in correct week (W1 for 06-10 anchored 06-01, no TODAY collision, legend), comma-join same week, omit out-of-window; renderMermaid Milestones section + native marker; renderCsv appended round-trip row + backward-compat single-arg equality. Full suite: 54 tests, 54 pass, 0 fail.

release:check pending verification next.

patch.value: Implemented milestone markers for ASCII, Mermaid, CSV with validations
